title: Realistic Bird Behavior
description: A mod that improves bird breeding behavior
body:
This mod improves parrot behavior and makes parrots breedable.

Just like other vanilla animals, feeding two parrots with “parrot food” will make them slowly approach each other and eventually produce a baby parrot.

Baby parrots can also perch on the player’s shoulder and will gradually grow into adults over time.

Known Issue:

Currently, the parrot breeding AI is not very proactive. Players may need to make them sit and nudge them closer to help initiate breeding.

![Parrot family](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2703671563b925fc4eeba806dbd15d5adfa01cf1.png)
